Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"employee":{"id":1,"details":{"forename":"Jens","location":{"language":"German"}},"hobbies":[{},{},{},{},{}]},"teammates":[{"id":4,"details":{"forename":"Björn"},"products":["FINANCE","HUMAN_RESOURCES","MARKETING"]},{"id":11,"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"},"products":["FINANCE"]}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
